faqs.q: 3. What is the warranty on Oxymed Mini in India?
faqs.a: Oxymed Mini comes with 3 years of warranty in India.

description_text:
Oxymed Mini 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrator

Oxymed Mini 5 LPM is one of the most popular names in the Indian oxygen concentrator market as it has the largest dealer network in India with over 40 service centres. This machine delivers oxygen at the flow rate of 0.5-5 LPM with a purity level of more than 90% at all flow rates.

Smallest Home Oxygen Concentrator: Weighing just 13.9 Kgs, Oxymed Mini is the second lightest oxygen concentrator in the market. Its compact design ensures that the machine could be easily shifted from one location to another.

Sound: Oxymed Mini Oxygen Concentrator emits sound at 45 dB.

Power Consumption: The machine consumes 390 watts of power.

Digital Flow Meter: The device comes with a digital flow regulator through which flow rate can be increased or decreased at the intervals of 0.5 LPM using the +/- buttons. 

Oxygen Purity Analyzer: Oxymed Mini comes with an inbuilt oxygen purity analyzer through which users can get to know the oxygen purity level that is being delivered in real-time. 

Operating Altitude: Operating altitude of Oxymed Mini is 7500 feet.

Outlet Pressure: The outlet pressure of the device is 10 psi.

User-Friendly Folding Screen Display: The digital screen of Oxygen Mini shows the current flow rate, oxygen purity, timer and hour meter. 

Warranty: The warranty period of Oxymed Mini oxygen concentrator is 3 years.

Additional Features:


	Oxymed mini has an in-built nebulizer
	The machine comes with a digital as well as a rotating ball-type flow meter.
	There are locks on its front wheels which prevent the machine from slipping on the smooth floor. 
	The Oxymed Company provides home installation services in almost 50 cities across India.


What's in the Box?


	
	Oxymed Oxygen concentrator
	
	
	Humidifier Bottle
	
	
	User manual
	
	
	Nasal cannula
	
	
	Nebulizer Kit
	
	
	Additional filter set
	
	Power Cable
